arts.ttl: Barcelona considering transfer swoop for 27-year-old Crystal Palace star
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly considering a surprise transfer move for Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta for this summer. The Frenchman has been in fine form for the Eagles in the last year or so, though he’s not necessarily someone you’d expect to be seeing linked with the very biggest names in European club football. arts.ttl: Flick confirms Gavi out, Dani Olmo ‘an option’ against Valencia
arts.sum: Tuesday brought some good news as Dani Olmo return to training after missing two weeks with a calf issue, and the attacking midfielder’s return comes at a perfect time thanks to the head injury sustained by Gavi during last weekend’s clash with Alavés. Hansi Flick confirmed in a press conference on Wednesday that Gavi is in concussion protocol and will not be available for the trip, but that Olmo is indeed back and is expected to play some minutes in the second half.

There was great news at Tuesday's Barça training session ahead of the cup game at Mestalla on Thursday at 9.30pm CET. Araujo, although he did not want to reveal his new release clause, insisted on his desire to continue as a Barça player and pointed out that "we all did a great job and now I feel valued, that's the important thing.
